setupPrompt.title: Set up your lawn profile
setupPrompt.description: Get personalized care recommendations for your area.

lawnPlan.title: My Lawn Plan
lawnPlan.description: View your full-year soil & fertilizer schedule.

journal.title: Lawn Journal
journal.subtitle: Track every mow, water, and treatment.
journal.emptyDescription: Tap "Log Activity" to start tracking your lawn care.

photos.title: Photo Timeline
photos.subtitle: Capture your lawn's progress over time.
photos.emptyDescription: Snap a photo of your lawn to start tracking its progress.

profile.title: Your Lawn Profile
profile.subtitle: Customize your profile so Grasswise can give you the most accurate recommendations.

personal.title: Personal
personal.detectHelp: Tap detect to auto-fill your location, zone, and region.

climate.title: Climate & Zone
climate.zoneHint: Changing your zone will suggest a matching climate region automatically.

toasts.locationFailedDesc: Please enable location permissions or enter manually.

soilPlan.title: My Lawn Plan
soilPlan.subtitle: Your year-round soil & fertilizer schedule for {{region}} · Zone {{zone}} · {{year}}

setupPrompt.title: Set your location first
setupPrompt.description: Your plan is customized by zone. Detect your location for best results.

soilPlan.grassTypeNote: 🌿 {{grassType}} — This plan is optimized for your grass type in {{region}} (Zone {{zone}}).

weeklyGoals.title: Weekly Goals
weeklyGoals.cta: Set targets like "Mow 1×, Water 3×" to stay on track.

exportBackup.title: Data & Backup
exportBackup.description: All your data is stored locally on this device. Export a backup or restore from a previous one.

confirmRestore.title: Replace all data?
confirmRestore.description: This will overwrite your current profile, journal, photos, and achievements with the backup file. This cannot be undone.

toasts.exportedDesc: Keep this file safe — you can restore it later.
toasts.invalidFileDesc: This doesn't look like a Grasswise backup.
toasts.restoreFailedDesc: The file could not be parsed.

progressCharts.title: Activity Trends
progressCharts.emptyDescription: Start logging activities to see trends here.
